{{Infobox character
| name = Ozriel (The Elder Empire: Sea)
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea
| titles = Eighth Judge of the Court of Seven, the Destroyer, Outsider
| abilities = Intent
| introduced = Of Kings and Killers
}}

''See also: [[Ozriel (The Elder Empire: Sea) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Ozriel is an [[Outsider]] and a member of the [[Court of Seven]], serving as its eighth [[Judge]]. Known by the title the [[Destroyer]], he represents the ultimate conclusion of all existence. While he possesses a human appearance and can be found relaxing in luxury, he is an incredibly dangerous entity capable of erasing entire worlds. He has been tasked with the destruction of a specific world, and his presence is marked by his black armor, pale hair, and a crackling [[scythe]]. Ozriel has threatened total planetary annihilation, specifically warning that he will destroy a world if certain names are used for him. He has noted that the damage to a world's sky is being sustained by the [[Great Elders]], and he suggests that if those powers are diminished, the world might be able to repair itself. Despite his destructive purpose and his role in potentially breaking the shield that protects reality, he is considered more tolerable than the entity [[Urg’naut]].}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Ozriel, the Eighth [[Judge]] of the [[Court of Seven]] who identifies as the [[Destroyer]], is an [[Outsider]] characterized by his pale skin, intense blue eyes, and long white hair worn beneath liquid-like black armor. After releasing his [[Intent]], he was described by [[Kelarac]] as a furnace for disposing of trash, and he previously engaged [[Calder]] in a conversation conducted solely through consciousness. Waiting beyond the world with the intent to destroy it, he regards [[Urg’naut]] across the abyss and has spoken of his duty should things escape. This [[Outsider]], who plans to kill everyone, sent a message burned directly into the streets of the [[Capital]] and wields a [[scythe]] that crackles against the blue membrane of reality.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Ozriel is the Eighth [[Judge]] of the [[Court of Seven]] and calls himself 'the [[Destroyer]]'.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Ozriel wears smooth, liquid-like black armor and has long flowing white hair.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Ozriel has intense blue eyes and pale skin.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Ozriel released his [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Ozriel is described by [[Kelarac]] as a furnace in which trash is disposed.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] has met with Ozriel to experience conversing using only his consciousness.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Ozriel is waiting beyond the world and has threatened to destroy it.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c21">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Ozriel has spoken about his job if things escape.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Ozriel and [[Urg’naut]] regard one another across the abyss.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Ozriel sent a message that was burned into the streets of the [[Capital]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Ozriel is an [[Outsider]] who plans on killing everyone.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Outsider]] is Ozriel.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Ozriel uses a [[scythe]] that crackles against a blue membrane over reality.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Ozriel’s words rang in his memory. “But if they escape, I’ll have to do my job.”<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c22" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
